goal: Turn capability truth drift into a hard CI failure by compiling and checking capability-evidence, generated truth, scorecard, and verification-report sections from the same tracked evidence sources.
successCriteria: Capability truth compiles deterministically from baseline, tracked decisions, and latest gate artifact.
Capability-evidence snapshot, generated truth source, scorecard, and verification-report truth sections fail CI when they drift apart.
Release review can trust that tracked truth and rendered docs are generated from the same evidence set.
explicitlyOutOfScope: Remote docs scraping as a primary truth source.
Changing tracked maturity decisions inside the drift-enforcement package.
